title: Candle Image Embeddings Model Spec
description: Candle model specification for image embedding generation (CLIP).
documentation:
## Purpose
Identifies a CLIP model for producing dense vector representations of images via the Candle backend. Image embeddings can be compared with text embeddings in the same CLIP vector space for cross-modal retrieval.

## When to use
Use this type when wiring an image embedding cap that targets the Candle runtime. The default points to OpenAI's CLIP ViT-B/32 model. For text-only embeddings use `media:model-spec;candle;textable;embeddings`.

## Notes
The include query filter (`*.json,*.safetensors,pytorch_model.bin`) selects only the files needed for inference, skipping large optional files such as optimizer states. CLIP repositories often contain both safetensors and PyTorch variants; the filter ensures the lighter safetensors files are preferred.
